Video.summary: Dorothy visits a kindergarten, Wags wins a sack race and Anthony gets ready for bubble painting!
Video.title: Bubble Painting

Video.summary: Anthony makes splodge paintings; everyone sings a song about vegetable soup.
Video.title: Vegetable Soup

Video.summary: The Wiggles and their friends sail on the SS Feathersword; making rosy tea for Dorothy the Dinosaur.
Video.title: Rosy Tea

Video.summary: Join Dorothy at the Australian Museum, looking at some of her dinosaur ancestors.
Video.title: Hula Hoops

Video.summary: Sing "Balla Balla Bambina" with The Wiggles as Dorothy discovers something fishy at the aquarium.
Video.title: Something Fishy at the Aquarium

Video.summary: Today, Anthony is fingerpainting while Captain Feathersword uses his magic buttons to exercise.
Video.title: C'est Wags!

Video.summary: Travel to Italy with Captain Feathersword and Professor Singalotta Songa!
Video.title: Dorothy's Ballet

Video.summary: Spend time in the Big Red Car, make pies and come along to a live concert!
Video.title: Making Pies

Video.summary: Take a musical quiz with The Wiggles. Then, travel to London on the S.S Feathersword!
Video.title: Kangaroo Dance

Video.summary: Join The Little Wiggles and their friends as they learn languages from around the world!
Video.title: Shiver Me Timbers

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword makes animal sounds with magic buttons; Anthony and Alfonso make fruit salad.
Video.title: Fruit Salad, Yummy Yummy!

Video.summary: Dorothy visits a children's hospital, Anthony makes sequined collages.
Video.title: Point Your Fingers and Do the Twist!

Image.alt: Point Your Fingers and Do the Twist!
Point Your Fingers and Do the Twist!
Point Your Fingers and Do the Twist!

Video.summary: Visit Athens with Captain Feathersword and his friendly crew; see how Jeff paints the Wiggle House!
Video.title: Friendly Feathersword Crew

Video.summary: The Wiggles ride a San Francisco trolley car, conduct the orchestra and more!
Video.title: I Swing My Baton

Video.summary: The Little Wiggles have a cake competition. Then, sing along with The Wiggles and their friends!
Video.title: Tick-Tock, Tick-Tock

Video.summary: Join The Wiggles and their friends for some "Hot Potato" and go back to when The Wiggles were young!
Video.title: Prehistoric Party

Video.summary: Join Captain Feathersword and his crew in the hula; visit the Wiggle House and a Wiggly Concert.
Video.title: Wiggly Friends

Video.summary: On a rainy day, the Wiggles and their friends paint pictures; Anthony introduces the letter A.
Video.title: Fruity Fun

Video.summary: Australian cricketer Brett Lee shows how much fun cricket can be; Greg talks about beach safety.
Video.title: The Wiggle Way

Video.summary: Sing and dance to songs from around the world with The Wiggles as they take us to Japan!
Video.title: A Wiggly Concert

Video.summary: Celebrate Captain Feathersword's birthday; The Wiggles sing songs all about animals.
Video.title: Playing a Trick on the Captain

Image.alt: Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain
Playing a Trick on the Captain

Video.summary: Australian country music star Beccy Cole joins The Wiggles as they sing songs.
Video.title: Pirate Radio

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword borrows his friend's special nautical jacket; wearing hats in the sun.
Video.title: It's Sunny Today!

Video.summary: Come along on a picnic with The Wiggles; The Little Wiggles decide to go to the beach.
Video.title: Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Image.alt: Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?
Would You Like to Dance With Me?

Video.summary: Learn to say hello in many languages, and join The Wiggles at the Johnson's Space Centre in Houston!
Video.title: Hola Todos!

Video.summary: The Wiggles songs in different languages; Little Anthony dreams about being a superhero of food.
Video.title: Shalom Everybody!

Video.summary: Dance with Dorothy, be amazed as Greg performs magic, sing C'est Wags, C'est Bon in France and more!
Video.title: Sway from Side

Video.summary: Songs about animals; Captain Feathersword's crew have a race; ride in the Big Red Car.
Video.title: Fluff Out Your Feathers

Video.summary: Take a ride across the water in the Big Red Boat.
Video.title: It's So Good for You!

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his acrobatic crew dance; The Wiggles learn the importance of cleanliness.
Video.title: Mop-Mop!

Video.summary: See the sites of Sydney Harbour on Captain Feathersword's surprise piratical, nautical vessel.
Video.title: Sydney Harbour

Video.summary: Murray solves a Wiggly mystery.
Video.title: The Long Tail Bilby

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his friends play soccer on the S.S Feathersword; meet Tom the cockatoo.
Video.title: Shh! Shh! Shh!

Video.summary: Dr. Verygood, a local physician, helps Anthony after he loses his appetite.
Video.title: Amazing Alpaca

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword and his crew do a shoe inspection.
Video.title: All Shook Up

Video.summary: Friendly animals help with counting in Over the Meadow! Plus, Henry teaches about the Gawa people.
Video.title: Together We Live So Happily

Video.summary: Anthony is joined by some dancers dressed up as cowboys; The Wiggles don suits for a special tune.
Video.title: Oh, Captain!

Video.summary: Wags the Dog and Dorothy the Dinosaur explore flying animals; name some animals that can fly.
Video.title: Hear the Drumbeat

Video.summary: Dorothy the Dinosaur teaches about opposites; a beautiful ballerina dances with a teddy bear.
Video.title: Teddy Bear Touch the Ground

Video.summary: Discover various languages through songs sung in French by Dorothy the Dinosaur and Sam in English!
Video.title: Ding, Ding, Dong!

Video.summary: Have loads of fun learning about healthy veggies before going on an exciting kitten adventure!
Video.title: Kittens and Mittens

Video.summary: Wags and Dorothy play an energetic ball game encouraging children to work together!
Video.title: Surf, Sand and Sun

Video.summary: Captain Feathersword introduces his pirate crew; Dorothy's favorite dance: "Romp Bomp A Stomp."
Video.title: Pirate Dancing

Video.summary: Jeff and Murray need help to paint a circus picture; Prince Michael searches for his princess.
Video.title: The Queen of the Land

Video.summary: Henry, Dorothy and Wags one the importance of learning to swim, demonstrating different strokes.
Video.title: Buzz, Buzz, Buzz
